description_long: This house features a modern, low-profile design with a flat roof and clean, rectangular lines. The structure is composed of two main volumes: a larger primary living area and a smaller detached or semi-detached section, possibly a garage or guest suite. Large glass windows are visible along the front and side facades, allowing for ample natural light and a connection to the outdoors. The exterior is finished in a combination of neutral-toned materials, including concrete, glass, and metal, with green-tinted window panels. The property includes a spacious paved area and what appears to be a green courtyard or garden space. The overall layout is open and horizontal, emphasizing simplicity and functionality.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large glass windows, and a spacious courtyard or garden area. The design is minimalist, with clean lines and neutral exterior materials.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, and the expansive paved and green courtyard area.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the main building and the smaller detached section, with visible roof overhangs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade, additional windows, and the full length of the house.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the secondary structure and the green courtyard area adjacent to the main building.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large glass panels
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a flat overhang, wide steps, and large glass doors, minimal decorative elements
